escalation.rationale: Active US-Israeli military operations against Iran with Strait of Hormuz blockade disrupting global shipping and energy markets.

ticker_items: Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz, 90% drop in shipping traffic
US airstrikes hit Tehran facilities, Iran's leader wounded
Oil prices surge above $100 amid Gulf shipping crisis
Hezbollah fires 100 rockets at Israel from Lebanon
Trump threatens to hit Iran 'very hard' after claiming 90% missile destruction

middle_east.description: US strikes military sites on Iran's Kharg island, home to vast oil facilities.
US Embassy in Baghdad targeted with missile strike hitting helipad.
Israeli attack kills 12 medical personnel including doctors, paramedics and nurses.
Israel conducts targeted killing attempt in areas of Beirut not previously hit in conflict.
Israeli forces target Hezbollah positions in Beirut city center amid escalating conflict.
US-Israeli strikes hit residential areas in Tehran causing civilian casualties.
Hezbollah launches approximately 100 rockets at northern Israel with Iron Dome intercepting half.
Blast rocks Tehran amid latest wave of US and Israeli airstrikes

russia.text: Moscow on Friday urged the United States to lift more sanctions on its oil exports to stabilise the global energy markets, upended by the war in the Middle East.
russia.speaker: Unknown official
russia.title: Russian official

russia.text: Moscow on Friday urged the United States to lift more sanctions on its oil exports to stabilise the global energy markets, upended by the war in the Middle East
russia.speaker: Moscow official
russia.title: Government spokesperson

ukraine.text: The Ukrainian president is in Paris for talks with one of Kyiv's staunchest allies as the US-Israeli war on Iran has removed pressure on Moscow.
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

ukraine.text: US 30-day waiver on Russian oil sanctions is 'not the right decision' and won't help bring a stop to Russia's more than 4-year-old invasion of Ukraine
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: Watch what happens today to these crazy scoundrels
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: US President Donald Trump said the US was willing to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz to protect them from Iranian attack, as his administration searches for ways to ease high oil prices fuelled by the US-Israeli war on Iran.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Iranian forces announce that US- and Israeli-affiliated banks and economic institutions in the Middle East will now be targeted.
middle_east.speaker: Iranian forces
middle_east.title: Military spokesman

middle_east.text: Iran Supreme Leader's Representative in India recently addressed the media, clarifying that while the Strait of Hormuz is still navigable, the journey has become fraught with difficulties
middle_east.speaker: Iran Supreme Leader's Representative
middle_east.title: Representative in India

middle_east.text: It is an honour to be killing Iran's leadership, calling them deranged scumbags and boasting of decimating their military.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: The new so-called not-so-supreme leader is wounded and likely disfigured. He issued a weak written statement yesterday, but there was no voice or video.
middle_east.speaker: Pete Hegseth
middle_east.title: US Defense Secretary

middle_east.text: The Strait of Hormuz will remain closed to US ships.

observers.description: Nearly all German tourists evacuated from Middle East. Hundreds more Lufthansa flights cancelled due to regional instability.
French soldier killed in attack in Kurdish region of northern Iraq. President Macron leading efforts for international naval escorts to reopen Strait of Hormuz.
Congress criticizes government for co-sponsoring UN resolution condemning Iran. Former air chief emphasizes need for stronger air defense systems based on West Asia conflict lessons.

Russia reportedly provided Iran with target data for attacks on US military assets in the Persian Gulf. Moscow is urging the US to lift oil sanctions to stabilize global energy markets disrupted by the Iran war.
Serbia, a NATO partner, purchased Chinese supersonic missiles for its air force. China continues to provide technological support to regional actors amid global instability.
UK renewed joint defense pact with Ireland to bolster security ties amid tense geopolitical landscape. Britain continues monitoring Middle East developments while strengthening European partnerships.

EU nations remain divided on Iran war response, balancing political loyalty with energy security concerns. France leads efforts for international naval escorts to reopen Strait of Hormuz shipping routes.

Serbia, despite being a NATO partner and EU candidate, purchased Chinese supersonic missiles for its air force. This arms acquisition suggests Serbia is hedging between Western and Eastern military suppliers.

financial.notes: Oil prices surged above $100 as Iran's Strait of Hormuz blockade creates global shipping crisis affecting 20% of global oil supply.
